tool_input.description: Full-text search for form data registration patterns

tool_input.command:
cd /home/tie303177/work/nabledge/work1/.claude/skills/nabledge-6/knowledge && python3 -c "
import json, os

keywords = ['登録', 'insert', 'UniversalDao', 'フォーム', 'EntityUtil', 'Action', 'form']
results = []

target_files = [
    'processing-pattern/web-application/web-application-client-create1.json',
    'processing-pattern/web-application/web-application-client-create2.json',
    'processing-pattern/web-application/web-application-client-create3.json',
    'processing-pattern/web-application/web-application-client-create4.json',
    'processing-pattern/web-application/web-application-getting-started-client-create.json',
    'component/libraries/libraries-universal-dao.json',
    'component/libraries/libraries-create-example.json',
    'component/libraries/libraries-bean-util.json',
]

for fpath in target_files:
    full = os.path.join(fpath)
    if not os.path.exists(full):
        continue
    with open(full) as f:
        data = json.load(f)
    for s in data.get('sections', []):
        text = (s.get('title','') + ' ' + s.get('content','')).lower()
        score = sum(1 for kw in keywords if kw.lower() in text)
        if score > 0:
            results.append((score, fpath, s['id'], s.get('title','')))

results.sort(key=lambda x: -x[0])
for score, fpath, sid, title in results[:15]:
    print(f'{score}\t{fpath}:{sid}\t{title}')
"
